---
title: "index.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/vis/types/index.ts"
loc: 30
complexity: 1
logic_score: 9.02
style_score: 4.20
intel_score: 2.00
overall_score: 5.28
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 9.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.2/10
- **Intel [I]**: 2.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 5 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://d3-force-3d)

### Exports
- `d3`
- `d3`
